name: healthcare_lab_measurement
description: Lab measurements with visit-dependent treatment effects and reference ranges

columns.name: measurement_id
columns.description: Unique measurement identifier

columns.name: participant_id
columns.description: Foreign key to study participants table

generation.notes: maxValue is dynamically set to 30000 + n_participants - 1

columns.name: visit_number
columns.description: Study visit number (0=Screening through 6=End of Study)

columns.name: visit_name
columns.description: Descriptive visit name (derived from visit_number)

generation.expr: CASE WHEN visit_number = 0 THEN 'Screening' WHEN visit_number = 1 THEN 'Baseline' WHEN visit_number = 2 THEN 'Week 4' WHEN visit_number = 3 THEN 'Week 8' WHEN visit_number = 4 THEN 'Week 12' WHEN visit_number = 5 THEN 'Week 24' ELSE 'End of Study' END

columns.name: visit_date
columns.description: Date of the study visit

columns.name: lab_test
columns.description: Name of the laboratory test

columns.name: result_value
columns.description: Lab result value with visit-dependent treatment effects

generation.expr: CASE WHEN lab_test = 'Hemoglobin' THEN 10 + rand() * 8 + (visit_number * 0.2 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE -0.5 END) WHEN lab_test = 'WBC Count' THEN 3 + rand() * 9 + (visit_number * 0.15 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.6 THEN -1 ELSE 0.5 END) WHEN lab_test = 'ALT' THEN 10 + rand() * 80 + (visit_number * 2 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.7 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) WHEN lab_test = 'AST' THEN 10 + rand() * 80 + (visit_number * 1.8 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.7 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) WHEN lab_test = 'Creatinine' THEN 0.5 + rand() * 2 + (visit_number * 0.02 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.5 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) WHEN lab_test = 'BUN' THEN 7 + rand() * 23 + (visit_number * 0.5 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.5 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) WHEN lab_test = 'Glucose' THEN 70 + rand() * 100 + (visit_number * -2 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.65 THEN 1 ELSE -0.5 END) WHEN lab_test = 'HbA1c' THEN 5.0 + rand() * 5 + (visit_number * -0.15 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.65 THEN 1 ELSE -0.5 END) WHEN lab_test = 'LDL' THEN 80 + rand() * 120 + (visit_number * -3 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE -0.3 END) WHEN lab_test = 'HDL' THEN 35 + rand() * 45 + (visit_number * 1 * CASE WHEN rand() < 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE -0.5 END) ELSE 50 + rand() * 100 END

columns.name: result_units
columns.description: Unit of measurement for the lab result

generation.expr: CASE WHEN lab_test = 'Hemoglobin' THEN 'g/dL' WHEN lab_test = 'WBC Count' THEN '10E9/L' WHEN lab_test IN ('ALT', 'AST') THEN 'U/L' WHEN lab_test IN ('Creatinine', 'BUN', 'Glucose', 'LDL', 'HDL') THEN 'mg/dL' WHEN lab_test = 'HbA1c' THEN '%' ELSE 'units' END

columns.name: reference_min
columns.description: Lower bound of the normal reference range

generation.expr: CASE WHEN lab_test = 'Hemoglobin' THEN 12.0 WHEN lab_test = 'WBC Count' THEN 4.0 WHEN lab_test = 'ALT' THEN 7.0 WHEN lab_test = 'AST' THEN 10.0 WHEN lab_test = 'Creatinine' THEN 0.6 WHEN lab_test = 'BUN' THEN 7.0 WHEN lab_test = 'Glucose' THEN 70.0 WHEN lab_test = 'HbA1c' THEN 4.0 WHEN lab_test = 'LDL' THEN 0.0 WHEN lab_test = 'HDL' THEN 40.0 ELSE 10.0 END

columns.name: reference_max
columns.description: Upper bound of the normal reference range

generation.expr: CASE WHEN lab_test = 'Hemoglobin' THEN 16.0 WHEN lab_test = 'WBC Count' THEN 11.0 WHEN lab_test = 'ALT' THEN 56.0 WHEN lab_test = 'AST' THEN 40.0 WHEN lab_test = 'Creatinine' THEN 1.2 WHEN lab_test = 'BUN' THEN 20.0 WHEN lab_test = 'Glucose' THEN 99.0 WHEN lab_test = 'HbA1c' THEN 5.6 WHEN lab_test = 'LDL' THEN 100.0 WHEN lab_test = 'HDL' THEN 999.0 ELSE 100.0 END

columns.name: abnormal_flag
columns.description: Whether the result is outside the reference range

columns.name: change_from_baseline
columns.description: Absolute change from baseline (null for screening/baseline visits)

generation.expr: CASE WHEN visit_number > 1 THEN (result_value - result_value * (1 - visit_number * 0.02)) ELSE NULL END

columns.name: percent_change_from_baseline
columns.description: Percent change from baseline

generation.expr: CASE WHEN change_from_baseline IS NOT NULL THEN (change_from_baseline / result_value) * 100 ELSE NULL END

columns.name: clinically_significant
columns.description: Whether the abnormality is clinically significant (>30% outside reference)

generation.expr: abnormal_flag AND (result_value < reference_min * 0.7 OR result_value > reference_max * 1.3)

columns.name: specimen_type
columns.description: Type of biological specimen collected

columns.name: fasting_status
columns.description: Fasting status at time of sample collection

columns.name: sample_quality
columns.description: Quality assessment of the collected sample

columns.name: retest_flag
columns.description: Whether the sample requires retesting

generation.expr: CASE WHEN sample_quality != 'Acceptable' THEN true ELSE rand() < 0.03 END

columns.name: lab_technician
columns.description: Name of the lab technician who processed the sample

columns.name: reviewed_by_physician
columns.description: Reviewing physician (derived with Dr. prefix)

generation.notes: Uses omitted physician_name_base column with mimesis person.full_name
